creator: woodsb02@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 170112
Patch to update multimedia/ffmpeg2theora to 0.30

multimedia/ffmpeg2theora:
- Update to 0.30
- This new version also allows ffmpeg2theora to build successfully once multimedia/ffmpeg is updated to 3.0.x. Note that multimedia/ffmpeg is currently still on the 2.8.x branch, however this update is backwards compatible with ffmpeg 2.8.x.
- Tidy patches (pet portlint)

  Changes this release:
    https://git.xiph.org/?p=ffmpeg2theora.git;a=blob;f=ChangeLog;h=7b2c20e19e4ca6d042d8f2bb3d4491e513d422fa;hb=ff86d204adf335b6314ef568b08d4af8799f108d
